items.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
items.dek: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.
items.body: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Philippine Senate in lockdown after gunshots fired
items.dek: Police commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.
items.body: Police commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.
